countries.title: Countries to Monitor
countries.description: Country codes: DE, FR, AT, HU, CZ, SK, RO, PL, IT, ES, NL, BE, CH, SI, HR

priceThreshold.title: Price Alert Threshold (EUR/MWh)
priceThreshold.description: Alert if any country exceeds this

emailTo.title: Alert Email To
emailTo.description: Recipient email address for price alerts (optional)

emailFrom.title: Alert Email From (optional)
emailFrom.description: Sender email address (defaults to gmailUser if not set)

gmailUser.title: Gmail Username
gmailUser.description: Your Gmail address for SMTP (required for email alerts)

gmailPass.title: Gmail App Password
gmailPass.description: Gmail App Password (not regular password - enable 2FA first)
